theater_description: A tightly bounded local civilian episode inside Operation Linebacker II: the 26 December 1972 strike on Kham Thien in Hanoi.
geometry_method_note: Civilian denominator is local to Kham Thien because the source explicitly reports a resident stock of 30,000 for the struck area.
military_area_note: No same-night local military, militia, or air-defense exposure denominator was recovered, so no full DR is published.
civilian_area_note: Civilian denominator uses the reported local resident stock of 30,000 for a one-day episode, converted into person-months.
split_reason: Broader Hanoi and Haiphong episodes were not retained because the Kham Thien local episode has materially stronger denominator matching.
quality_note: Strong bounded civilian episode with an explicit resident denominator, but only fallback intensity is publishable because the military side is missing.
